SessionStart.name: ntfy-config-check
SessionStart.description: Check ntfy configuration on session start

hooks.prompt: Silently check if ntfy is configured by looking for a config file at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/ntfy/config.json. If it exists and has a topic set, say nothing. If it doesn't exist or has no topic, output: '[ntfy] Not configured. Run /ntfy setup to enable push notifications.'

PostToolUse.name: long-task-notify
PostToolUse.description: Suggest sending notification after long-running bash commands

hooks.prompt: Check if the bash command that just ran took more than 60 seconds or was a deployment/build/test command (docker build, npm run build, pytest, odoo -u, pg_dump, pg_restore). If so, suggest: 'Long-running task completed. Send a notification? Use /ntfy send "Task done"'. If not a long task, say nothing.
